name: OpenIPAHound 21 Research - Certificate Enrollment
description: Shows principals that can enroll collected FreeIPA certificate templates through CA ACL scope. IPA_Enroll is non-traversable because PKINIT and service-certificate target use need separate validation.
query:
MATCH p=(principal)-[enroll:IPA_Enroll]->(template:IPA_CertificateTemplate)
WHERE principal:IPA_User OR principal:IPA_Group OR principal:IPA_Service OR principal:IPA_Computer OR principal:IPA_HostGroup
RETURN p,
       coalesce(principal.uid, principal.cn, principal.principal, principal.fqdn) AS principal_name,
       template.cn AS certificate_template,
       enroll.ca AS ca
LIMIT 1000
